reasoning: Take-Two has explicitly targeted a "Fall 2025" release and reconfirmed it as recently as February 2025. A global release would guarantee European availability. However, Rockstar Games has a well-known history of delaying its major titles to ensure polish (e.g., GTA IV and RDR2 both slipped from their original release years). A "Fall" target means even a short delay of 2–4 months pushes the game into 2026. Because Take-Two's Fiscal Year 2026 runs until March 31, 2026, the company can delay the game into early 2026 without missing its massive FY26 revenue projections. Given the complexity of the game and these incentives, there is a substantial chance (approx. 40%) that the game slips into calendar year 2026, hence a 59% probability that it successfully launches in Europe by the end of 2025.
